label: General Education (2025-2026 and Greater)
notes: Students who transfer in an AA or AS degree earned after graduating from high school are exempt from all GE requirements except practicum.
AAS degrees with approved articulation agreements also receive this exemption.
AP & IB courses may not fulfill any general education requirements.

divisional.rule: No more than two courses of the same prefix may be used to fulfill divisional requirements. Each course may only be used once in these requirements.

lab_science.label: Lab Science
lab_science.note: Must enroll in and pass both the lab (L suffix) and corresponding lecture.

additional.note: Courses used below may overlap with divisional requirements. A course may be used more than once in the following categories.

first_year_seminar.label: First Year Seminar
first_year_seminar.note: Enter FS-110 (current) or a FYS-### course code, or mark manually

writing_emphasis.label: Writing Emphasis
writing_emphasis.note: Courses must carry a WE designation. Count may be reduced for transfer students.

dac.label: Diversity Across the Curriculum
dac.note: Must be from the official DAC approved course list (see dac_2025.json)

practicum.label: Practicum
practicum.note: One experience integrating academic learning with significant off-campus or co-curricular activity. Mark manually.
